error_signature: Switch node always outputs first output instead of empty output
title: Switch node incorrectly routes empty outputs
symptom: When using the Switch node with 'Always Output Data' enabled, it incorrectly routes empty outputs through the first output instead of the intended output. This disrupts the expected workflow behavior.
root_cause: This issue arises from a bug in the Switch node's logic, where it fails to correctly identify and route empty outputs when the 'Always Output Data' option is enabled. Instead, it defaults to the first output, leading to incorrect flow execution.
fix_steps: Disable 'Always Output Data' on the Switch node
Add a No Operation node after each output to handle empty cases
Test the workflow to ensure it behaves as expected
agent_instruction: Disable 'Always Output Data' on the Switch node and add No Operation nodes as needed.
